title: populus balsamifera var. elongata
intro: Populus balsamifera var. elongata, also known as narrowleaf cottonwood, is a variety of the white poplar tree native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Populus balsamifera var. elongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include making a salve or tincture from its bark and leaves, which can be applied topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
